title: Agent probes assumptions instead of solutioning
description: Given a vague user request, the agent should ask clarifying questions that surface assumptions, not immediately propose solutions.

persona.role: first-time user with a vague goal
persona.background: User has not yet thought through what they actually want
goals: Sharpen their idea before committing to a direction

preconditions: Agent is configured with default persona

turns.input: I want to add AI to our product.

assertions.message: Agent should not jump to tool calls before understanding the request.

assertions.value: Response surfaces at least two assumptions in the user's statement (e.g. what 'AI' means, what problem it should solve, who the user of that feature would be).
assertions.message: Agent failed to probe assumptions — response was solutioning instead of inquiring.
Agent should inquire, not recommend, on first contact with a vague request.

expectedBehavior: Agent asks 2-4 clarifying questions focused on assumptions and user problems.
Agent does not propose a design or implementation.
Agent surfaces at least one tension or tradeoff the user may not have considered.
